vision: A distraction-free mobile application that helps individuals capture and track daily tasks quickly to stay organised and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to quickly capture new tasks with essential details to build their to-do list

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture something I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title and confirm Then a new task appears in my task list with the entered title
Given I am creating a new task When I try to save without entering a title Then I am prevented from saving and shown a validation message
stories.notes: Foundation for all task management functionality

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I optionally select a due date Then the task is saved with the selected due date displayed
Given I am creating a new task When I choose not to set a due date Then the task is saved without a due date

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete to track their progress and accomplishments

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task in my list When I tap to mark it complete Then the task is visually indicated as complete
Given I have a completed task When I tap to mark it incomplete Then the task returns to incomplete status

epics.name: Task Deletion
epics.description: Enable users to remove tasks they no longer need from their list

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task from my list, so that I can remove items I no longer need to track
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I choose to delete it Then the task is removed from my task list
Given I am deleting a task When I confirm the deletion Then the task is permanently removed and cannot be recovered

epics.name: Task List Viewing
epics.description: Provide users with a clear view of all their tasks in a simple list format

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a single list, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks saved When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list format
Given I have no tasks saved When I open the app Then I see an empty state indicating no tasks exist

stories.title: Filter to show incomplete tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my task list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I have the incomplete filter active When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed again

stories.title: Filter to show complete tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my task list to show only complete tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I apply the complete filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I have the complete filter active When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed again

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensure user tasks are saved locally and persist across app sessions

stories.title: Persist tasks locally on device
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved on my device, so that I do not lose them when I close the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my previously saved tasks are still visible
Given I have marked tasks as complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved

epics.name: Cross-Platform Support
epics.description: Ensure the application works seamlessly on both iOS and Android mobile platforms

stories.title: Support iOS platform
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my iOS device, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred mobile platform
acceptance_criteria: Given I am using an iOS device When I install and open the app Then all features function correctly
Given I am using an iOS device When I perform task operations Then they feel instantaneous with no perceivable delay

stories.title: Support Android platform
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my Android device, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred mobile platform
acceptance_criteria: Given I am using an Android device When I install and open the app Then all features function correctly
Given I am using an Android device When I perform task operations Then they feel instantaneous with no perceivable delay
